# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

As of March 2022 (and until this document is updated), only **[github-template](https://github.com/wr-projects/github-template/)** version **v0.0.1 _stable_** is supported for upgrades. All previous versions are currently not supported and users are advised to use them _"at their own risk"_.

## Here are the possibilities to report a vulnerability

  - You can send us an email at **[security.wrprojects@gmail.com](mailto:security.wrprojects@gmail.com)**
  - You can open **[an incident on GitHub](https://github.com/wr-projects/github-template/issues/new?assignees=&labels=%F0%9F%94%90+security%2C%F0%9F%86%98+help-needed&template=VULNERABILITY-REPORT.yml&title=%F0%9F%94%90+%5BVULNERABILITY%5D+-+%3Ctitle%3E)** by respecting **[the terms of use]()**

## Disclosure Policy

To check our disclosure policy, please see **[this documentation]()**.
